events.event_title: Epstein Sexually Abused Multiple Minor Girls at 9 E. 71st St (2002–2005)
events.description: Epstein sexually abused multiple minor girls at his 9 East 71st Street residence in Manhattan between approximately 2002 and 2005 as alleged in the federal indictment; Minor victims as young as 14 were escorted to a massage room inside 9 East 71st Street where Epstein sexually abused them and paid them cash afterward; Epstein sexually abused Victim-1 on multiple occasions at 9 East 71st Street between 2002 and 2005 while the victim was under 18 years old
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was personally present and directly committed the offenses at this location

evidence.excerpt: from at least in or about 2002, up to and including at least in or about 2005, JEFFREY EPSTEIN sexually abused multiple minor girls in the Southern District of New York and elsewhere. During that time and continuing to the present, EPSTEIN possessed and controlled the Subject Premises

when a victim arrived at the Subject Premises, she would be escorted to a room inside the Subject Premises with a massage table, where she would perform a massage on EPSTEIN. The victims, who were as young as 14 years of age, were told by EPSTEIN or other individuals to partially or fully undress before beginning the "massage."
Between approximately 2002 and 2005, EPSTEIN sexually abused Victim-1 on multiple occasions in the Subject Premises. This sexual abuse all occurred when Victim-1 was under the age of 18.
Epstein and Maxwell took her shopping.
Over the years, from ages fourteen to seventeen
In a plane on a yacht in NY, in DC, at the vineyard.

events.event_title: Leon Black Accused of Raping Woman at Epstein's NYC Townhouse (~2001–2002)
events.description: Victim alleges Leon Black raped her approximately 20 years earlier (2001 or 2002) at Epstein's Manhattan townhouse on a massage table, causing severe pain; A 16-year-old minor victim was told to give Leon Black a massage at Epstein's townhouse and was violently raped; Black used adult sex toys causing severe bleeding; After the violent assault by Leon Black, the bleeding victim was denied medical treatment and flown out of New York the next day, never returning to NYC afterward
events.nexus_reasoning: Abuse occurred at Epstein's personal residence, facilitated by his trafficking operation

evidence.excerpt: Victim said Black raped her around 20 years ago (2001 or 2002) in Epstein's townhouse

Minor victim, at Epstein's townhouse and was told to give Leon Black a massage, violently raped by black
16 years old when raped by Black

Black used adult sex toys in victim's rectum and vagina. Victim felt severe pinching in her vagina and began bleeding from her rectum; Black and others at Epstein's house would not take her to the doctor and instead flew her out of NY the next day
From 2001 to end of 2004, she was trafficked by sex with at least 25 different men

evidence.excerpt: Brad Karp will join the Kathy Ruemmler meeting tomorrow at 5:30pm_he says he can stay for about an hour but must leave to introduce someone at a dinner in midtown at 6:45pm...

events.event_title: Epstein Abused Dozens of Minors at Palm Beach Residence (2002–2005)
events.description: Epstein sexually exploited and abused dozens of minor girls at his Palm Beach residence as alleged in the federal indictment returned July 2, 2019
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was personally present committing the offenses at his Palm Beach home

evidence.excerpt: JEFFREY EPSTEIN, the defendant, sexually exploited and abused dozens of minor girls at his homes in Manhattan, New York, and Palm Beach, Florida, among other locations.
I will never be able to forgive myself for not being able to tell you what Ms. Vicki does

events.event_title: Victim and Her Mother Invited to Tea at Epstein's Palm Beach House
events.description: Victim and her mother visited Epstein's Palm Beach house for tea by the pool where Epstein presented himself as a mentor to young talented individuals; Victim regularly visited Epstein's Palm Beach house from ages 14 to 17, receiving $200-300 in cash per visit to give to her mother; Juan Alessi worked as Epstein's house manager at the Palm Beach residence from 1990 to 2002, witnessing Maxwell take control of household operations around 1993
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was physically present hosting the victim and her mother at his residence

evidence.excerpt: she recalls someone from Epstein's office calling her house and inviting her to come to Epstein's house in Palm Beach for tea. and her mother went to the house, where they had tea with Epstein by his pool.

subsequently began regularly spending time at Epstein's house in Palm Beach, beginning at age 14, and continuing until she was 17, when she relocated to New York City. During those visits, Epstein regularly gave her $200-300 in cash
Juan Alessi, who worked as Epstein's house manager in Palm Beach from 1990 to 2002
In approximately 1993, Maxwell began coming to the house in Palm Beach, and became in charge of the whole house.
He recalls Maxwell and Epstein spending time with her at the Palm Beach house, and he also remembers being sent to buy movie tickets, and driving Maxwell, her and Epstein to the movies.
We have also reviewed physical evidence seized from Epstein's Florida residence by the Palm Beach Police Department in October 20, 2005, pursuant to a search warrant.
